form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 450m at this track behind Aston Rennes beaten 2.25 lengths (25.98). Has a solid record from this box, including three wins. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Scored (25.77) last time out at Shepparton in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 and will break from box 2 for the first time. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was narrowly beaten two back when second (24.25) over 425m at Bendigo. Aided by a low draw and in the mix on her best form.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 450m at this track. Not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Bendigo to win by 9 lengths in 23.65, beating Smiling Bee. Last start finished last on April 5 over 425m at Bendigo behind Paw Ortiz beaten 8 lengths (24.44) in a SE. Mixing his form but shapes as a genuine contender under these conditions.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th over 460m at Geelong beaten 9 lengths (26.42) behind Little Flower in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. Has ability and among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th over 460m at Geelong beaten 9 lengths (26.42) behind Little Flower in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 7. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3 length fourth (23.12) over 400m at Geelong. Hard to recommend this time.
